welcome: 🎉 Welcome to the Giveaway & Contest Bot! I help you organize giveaways and contests in your Telegram chats. 📌 What you can do: 🎲 Create giveaways (random winner) 🏅 Create contests (submissions + voting) 🚪 Auto-accept channel join requests 👥 Invite friends and earn points 👇 Use the buttons below!
help: 📖 Qurachi Bot — Help 🎲 Giveaway: Create a prize draw — winner picked randomly 🏅 Contest: Users submit entries, others vote for the best 🚪 Join Requests: Auto-accept channel join requests 👥 Referrals: Invite friends and earn loyalty points 🏆 Leaderboard: Top most active users ⚙️ Settings: Language, notifications 👇 Use the buttons below!
ref_info: 👥 Your Referral Link{gw_text} 🔗 {link} Share this link with friends! When they start the bot through your link and subscribe: • You earn +{points} loyalty points • You get +1 bonus entry in giveaways ⚠️ Only real accounts that join the required channel(s) count. 📊 Your referral stats: Verified referrals: {count} Points earned: {earned}
ref_pending: ⏳ Thanks for joining! Your referral will count once you subscribe to the required channel(s) and join a giveaway.
gw_create_title: 🎉 Create a New Giveaway Let's set it up! First, enter the title. ❌ To cancel, type "Cancel".
gw_create_description: 📝 Great! Now send me a description for the giveaway. (What are participants competing for? Any rules?) Or send /skip to skip the description.
gw_create_prize: 🎁 What's the prize? (e.g., '$50 Gift Card', 'Premium subscription', 'Custom artwork')
gw_create_winners: 🏆 How many winners should be drawn? (Send a number, e.g., 1, 3, 5)
gw_create_channels: 📢 Required channels (optional) Send the channels users must subscribe to before joining, separated by commas. (e.g., @channel1, @channel2) ⚠️ The bot must be an admin in each channel. Or send /skip for no requirement.
gw_must_subscribe: 📢 Please subscribe to the required channel(s) first! Check your private chat with me.
gw_subscribe_prompt: 📢 Almost there! To join {title}, subscribe to the channel(s) below, then tap "✅ I've subscribed".
gw_create_duration:
⏱ How long should the giveaway last?
Choose a duration or select 'No time limit' (you'll draw manually).
gw_invalid_number: ❌ Please send a valid number (1 or more).
gw_no_active: You have no active giveaways to draw.
gw_only_creator: ❌ Only the giveaway creator can draw winners.
gw_not_active: ❌ This giveaway is no longer active.
gw_no_participants: ❌ No participants yet! Can't draw winners.
gw_my_list_empty:
You haven't created any giveaways yet.

👇 Tap the "🎲 Create Giveaway" button below!
gw_cancel_only_creator: ❌ Only the creator can cancel this giveaway.
ct_create_title: 🏅 Create a New Contest Let's set it up! First, enter the title. ❌ To cancel, type "Cancel".
ct_create_description: 📝 Now give a description for the contest. (What should participants do? Any rules or criteria?) Or send /skip to skip.
ct_create_type: 📂 What type of submissions should the contest accept?
ct_create_prize: 🎁 What's the prize for the winner(s)? Or send /skip if there's no prize.
ct_create_max_subs:
🔢 How many submissions per user are allowed?
(Send a number, e.g., 1, 3, 5)
ct_create_winners: 🏆 How many winners should be chosen? (Send a number, e.g., 1, 3, 5)
ct_invalid_number: ❌ Please send a valid number (1 or more).
ct_not_accepting: ❌ This contest is no longer accepting submissions.
ct_submit_prompt: 📤 Submit to: {title} Use the /submit command to send your entry: • /submit {id} Your text entry here • Or reply to a photo with /submit {id} Contest type: {type}
ct_submit_usage: Usage: • /submit <contest_id> Your text here • Reply to a photo with /submit <contest_id>
ct_requires_text: ❌ This contest requires a text submission.
ct_requires_photo: ❌ This contest requires a photo. Reply to a photo with the /submit command.
ct_requires_content: ❌ Please provide text or a photo for your submission.
ct_max_reached: ❌ You've reached the maximum submissions ({max}) for this contest.
ct_voting_closed: ❌ Voting is closed for this contest.
ct_cant_vote_self: ❌ You can't vote for your own submission!
ct_already_voted: ❌ You've already voted for this submission!
ct_vote_recorded: 👍 Vote recorded! You voted for {user}'s submission in {title}.
ct_only_creator: ❌ Only the contest creator can manage this.
ct_not_in_submissions: ❌ Contest is not in submission phase.
ct_voting_started: 🗳 Voting has started for: {title} Submissions are now closed. Use /submissions {id} to view entries. Vote with: /vote <submission_id>
ct_only_creator_end: ❌ Only the contest creator can end it.
ct_no_subs_to_judge: ❌ No submissions to judge. Consider cancelling instead.
ct_cancel_only_creator: ❌ Only the creator can cancel this contest.
ct_my_list_empty:
You haven't created any contests yet.

👇 Tap the "🏅 Create Contest" button below!
gg_use_in_group: ❌ This command works in groups and channels! • In a group: Use /groupgiveaway directly • For a channel: Use /channelgiveaway in the channel's linked discussion group, or make the bot an admin in your channel and use /channelgiveaway there.
gg_use_in_channel:
❌ Use this command in:
• Your channel (bot must be admin)
• The channel's linked discussion group

The bot will post the giveaway and track comments as entries automatically.
gg_create_intro: 🎯 Create a {source} Comment Giveaway Users will comment on the giveaway post to enter. Only ONE comment per user counts! What's the title of this giveaway? Send /cancel to abort.
gg_channel_intro: 📢 Create a Channel Giveaway The giveaway will be posted in this chat. Users comment to enter — only FIRST comment counts! What's the title? Send /cancel to abort.
gg_ask_mode: 📋 Choose the giveaway mode: 🎲 Random — Pick random winner(s) from all commenters ⚡ First N — First N people to comment win 🔑 Keyword — Must include a specific word/phrase 👍 React — Users react to the post with any emoji to enter
gg_ask_keyword: 🔑 What keyword must commenters include? (e.g., a specific word, hashtag, or phrase)
gg_ask_channels: 📢 Required channels (optional) Send channels users must subscribe to before entering, separated by commas. (e.g., @channel1, @channel2) ⚠️ The bot must be an admin in each channel. Or send /skip for no requirement.
gg_ask_duration: ⏱ How long should entries be accepted?
gg_invalid_number: ❌ Please send a valid number (1 or more).
gg_how_comment: HOW TO ENTER: 💬 Comment on this post to participate! ⚠️ Only your FIRST comment counts.
gg_how_react: HOW TO ENTER: 👍 React to this post with any emoji to participate!
gg_already_entered: ⚠️ You've already entered! Only your first comment counts.
gg_keyword_required: ❌ Your comment must include the keyword: {keyword}
gg_must_subscribe_comment: 📢 To enter, please subscribe to: {channels}, then comment again.
gg_must_subscribe_react: 📢 To enter {title}, subscribe to: {channels}, then react again.
gg_no_active: You have no active group/channel giveaways.
gg_winner_dm: 🎉 You won! Giveaway: {title} 🎁 Prize: {prize} Contact the organizer to claim!
gg_no_participants_expired: ❌ Giveaway '{title}' ended with no valid entries.
